city_report.transport: The area covered in this guide is expansive, but the most popular attractions are almost all near the Zoologischer Garten train station and the Ku'damm, and thus easily within walking distance. If you want to visit the outlying ones, you may want to use Berlin's excellent public transportation system - the U-Bahn, S-Bahn and the bus networks. West Berlin, unlike East Berlin, had its tram network dismantled and you will find no trams here.

hotel.name: Amstel House Berlin
hotel.price: Four-bedded dorms from €12/person/night. Single and twin rooms en-suite also available

hotel.name: Jet Pak City
hotel.price: Double rooms start at €30 per person, sleeping hall starts at €18 per person

hotel.name: Meininger Hotel Berlin Central Station
hotel.price: Double Rooms start at €39 per person, dormitory starts at €21

attraction.name: Reichstag
attraction.description: Historic parliament building with a modern glass dome.

attraction.name: East Side Gallery
attraction.description: Longest remaining section of the Berlin Wall with murals.

attraction.name: Museum Island
attraction.description: UNESCO site housing five world-renowned museums.

attraction.name: Berlin Cathedral
attraction.description: Grand 19th-century cathedral on the Spree river.

attraction.name: TV Tower
attraction.description: Iconic landmark offering views from 203 meters up.

attraction.name: Checkpoint Charlie
attraction.description: Famous former border crossing between East and West.

attraction.name: Holocaust Memorial
attraction.description: Memorial to the murdered Jews of Europe.

attraction.name: Charlottenburg Palace
attraction.description: Largest palace in Berlin with beautiful gardens.

attraction.name: Potsdamer Platz
attraction.description: Public square and symbol of Berlin's urban renewal.

city_report.description: Capitale della resilienza e della cultura underground, Berlino offre una vastità di parchi pubblici senza eguali tra le grandi metropoli europee. Il mercato immobiliare e la sicurezza la rendono un magnete per talenti tecnologici e creativi.
city_report.wiki_intro: File:Berlin_Wikivoyage_locator_maps_-_City_West.png|150px|thumb|right|Location of the City West in Berlin '''City West''' is the heart of former West Berlin and even after reunification it represents the main retail centre of Berlin — all the best and most expensive shops are here. The area also includes some landmarks of great historical and cultural interest, as well as a large number of accomm...
